category_sources: source_facts.description says it detects tempo of audio files; official homepage describes tempo/BPM analysis for music files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bpm-tools; official homepage title is bpm-tools: Tempo analysis.
docs_sources: Official project homepage is the best documentation surface and includes usage/context plus source information.
repo_sources: Official homepage lists a Git repository and gives the git clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe automatic BPM/tempo detection for music files and command-line scripting use.
